caption: A video depicts a formal meeting of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" on "April 12, 2019," regarding "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage," as indicated by a persistent banner at the bottom of the screen featuring the "ORCA" logo. The setting is an office or conference room with wood-paneled walls, desks, and laptops. In the early sequence, several people in business attire, including suits and dress shirts, are seated at a large table. One man leans back while another looks toward a screen. The view then shifts to a close-up of a desk with a laptop and various office supplies. The scene eventually transitions to show two men in suits; one rests his head in his hand while the other, wearing a tie, appears to be speaking or gesturing. A laptop with a "NATIVE" sticker is visible on the table in front of them.
